description_long: This is a life-sized stone sculpture of a robed male figure standing upright on a rectangular base. The figure is depicted with a full beard and mustache, and his head is slightly bowed, giving a contemplative or solemn expression. He wears a long, draped garment that covers his body and falls in naturalistic folds, with one arm crossing over the other at the waist. The back of the sculpture shows the garment cascading down, with some weathering and discoloration visible on the surface. The overall craftsmanship is detailed, especially in the facial features and the drapery of the clothing. The sculpture appears to be made from a single block of stone, likely marble or limestone, and is intended for outdoor display.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a bearded man in draped robes, standing on a rectangular base with arms crossed at the waist. The figure has a contemplative expression and finely carved details in the face and clothing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, crossed arms, and detailed drapery of the robe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the draped garment, and the arm positioning.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the flowing garment, and visible weathering on the surface.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the drapery, and the stance of the figure.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the background is isolated and does not provide clues to the setting.
